items.content: The days are long but the years are short.
Lo's first word was 'nej' (no). She said it very firmly and has never stopped.
In family life, love is the oil that eases friction, the cement that binds closer together, and the music that brings harmony.
Klara read her first full chapter book alone aged 7, sitting under the kitchen table with a torch at 10pm.
Things we want to do: build a raised garden bed, learn to bake sourdough properly, visit grandparents more.
